revenue::district.sql:
SELECT district,
       MONTH(order_date) AS time_period,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS metric_value
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, MONTH(order_date)
ORDER BY district, time_period
revenue::district.query_text: Show revenue for the past 12 months.

sales::district.sql:
SELECT district,
       MONTH(order_date) AS time_period,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS metric_value
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, MONTH(order_date)
ORDER BY district, time_period
sales::district.query_text: Monthly sales totals for the last 12 months

amount::district.sql:

amount::district.query_text: Who are the highest paying customers?

orders::district.sql:
SELECT district,
       MONTH(order_date) AS time_period,
       COUNT(order_id) AS metric_value
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, MONTH(order_date)
ORDER BY district, time_period
orders::district.query_text: How many orders were placed today?
